d360_query_sql.tips: Always bound broad queries with LIMIT or a trace/session/id predicate.

d360_search_indexes_list.tips: Some orgs expose this surface only after search indexes are provisioned.

d360_retrievers_list.tips: Can return not-found when retriever APIs are not provisioned; do not use as a core readiness gate.

d360_metadata_search.tips: Use for discovery when compact catalogs are not enough. Include a metadataType filter when possible. If the response is PRISM_RUNTIME_ERROR and mentions msr_metadata_index__dlm, the org search plane is unindexed; fall back to d360_metadata_entities or d360_metadata list/describe.

d360_ci_validate.tips: Validate before creating or updating calculated insights.

d360_transform_validate.tips: Validation can return precise STL graph issues such as missing target DLOs.

d360_connection_test.tips: Pass connectorType as a query param and connector parameters/credentials in the body; this does not create a connection.

d360_ci_create.tips: Run d360_ci_validate first. apiName must end with __cio.

d360_ci_update.tips: Validate changes before update; updates can trigger recompilation.

d360_ci_run.tips: Run after validating and creating/enabling the calculated insight. Use dry_run first; execution can consume compute and update downstream results.

d360_ci_enable.tips: Use dry_run first; enabling a calculated insight can make it available to downstream segments and activations.

d360_ci_disable.tips: Use dry_run first; disabling a calculated insight can affect dependent segments and activations.

d360_segment_create.tips: Verify DMO/CI fields first. Prefer dry_run before create. Segment payload shapes can vary by definition type.

d360_segment_update.tips: Use dry_run first; changing a segment can affect downstream activations.

d360_segment_publish.tips: Publishing can start asynchronous membership calculation. Inspect segment status before and after.

d360_segment_deactivate.tips: Deactivate uses segment API/developer name, not always the internal id.

d360_activation_create.tips: Requires an active segment and a valid activation target. Use dry_run first.

d360_activation_update.tips: Use dry_run first; updating activations can affect downstream delivery.

d360_activation_target_create.tips: Must reference a valid connection/connector target. Use dry_run first.

d360_activation_target_update.tips: Use dry_run first; activation target changes can affect downstream delivery.

d360_transform_create.tips: Validate first with d360_transform_validate, then dry_run the create request before execution.

d360_transform_update.tips: Use dry_run first; changing a transform can affect generated DLO/DMO data.

d360_transform_run.tips: Manual runs can consume org resources and update transform outputs. Use dry_run first.

d360_transform_schedule_set.tips: Use dry_run first; schedule changes can trigger recurring downstream processing.

d360_dataaction_create.tips: Create or verify a data action target first. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_dataaction_target_create.tips: Data action targets are for event-triggered payloads, not segment activation targets. Use dry_run first.

d360_dataaction_target_update.tips: Use dry_run first; endpoint, credential, or payload changes can affect event delivery.

d360_retriever_list.tips: Use this to find retriever API names before create/update/configuration work.

d360_retriever_create.tips: Call d360_search_index_list first to find source search indexes. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_retriever_update.tips: Use dry_run first; updates change retriever metadata used by downstream RAG flows.

d360_retriever_config_create.tips: For NoCode configurations, provide input, outputFields, numberOfResults, and isActive. Use dry_run first.

d360_retriever_config_update.tips: At most one configuration can be active within a retriever. Use dry_run first.

d360_search_index_config.tips: Call this before creating or updating a search index to discover valid config ids.

d360_search_index_process_history.tips: The upstream MCP notes offset is 1-based and pagination may be unreliable.

d360_search_index_create.tips: Call d360_search_index_config first and use its supported config ids. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_search_index_update.tips: Call d360_search_index_config and d360_search_index_get first. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_datastream_create.tips: Prefer connector-specific create operations when possible. Verify the connection, source fields, DLO shape, and mappings first; then dry_run before execution.

d360_datastream_update.tips: Use dry_run first; updates affect future ingestion runs. Avoid sending read-only fields returned by get.

d360_datastream_run.tips: Salesforce CRM data streams cannot be manually triggered; use for S3, Snowflake, file upload, and other non-CRM streams. Dry-run first.

d360_datastream_create_sfdc.tips: Call d360_connection_list with connectorType=SalesforceDotCom first and use the selected connection alias. Engagement streams require eventDateTimeFieldName.

d360_datastream_create_aws_s3.tips: Call d360_connection_list with connectorType=AwsS3 first. Verify file parser attributes, source fields, DLO fields, mappings, and refresh config before execution.

d360_datastream_create_snowflake.tips: Use an existing Snowflake connection. Verify database, schema, object, DLO fields, primary key, mappings, and refresh mode before execution.

d360_dmo_create.tips: Do not include the __dlm suffix in body.name. Include at least one primary key field; Engagement DMOs require eventDateTimeFieldName. Use dry_run first.

d360_dmo_update.tips: Use dry_run first; DMO changes can affect mappings, calculated insights, segments, and downstream activations.

d360_dlo_create.tips: Data streams usually create DLOs automatically. Verify fields, category, dataspace, and primary key before execution; use dry_run first.

d360_dlo_update.tips: Use dry_run first; DLO schema changes can affect data streams, mappings, and search indexes.

d360_dmo_mapping_create.tips: Call d360_dlo_get and d360_dmo_get first to verify exact source/target field API names and types. Use dry_run first.

d360_dmo_mapping_update.tips: Use dry_run first; mapping changes affect future ingestion into the target DMO.

d360_dmo_field_mapping_add.tips: Call d360_dmo_mapping_get first, then add only verified source/target field names. Use dry_run first.

d360_connection_create.tips: Run d360_connection_test first with the same connectorType/body. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_connection_update.tips: Use dry_run first; connection changes can break dependent data streams, activation targets, and data actions.

d360_snowflake_connection_list.tips: Use connectorType=SNOWFLAKE to list Snowflake connections.

d360_connection_create_snowflake.tips: Provide private key content only at execution time. Test first when possible, then dry_run before execution.

d360_ir_list.tips: Use this to discover ruleset ids before update, publish, or run operations.

d360_ir_create.tips: Verify source DMOs, matching fields, match methods, and reconciliation rules first. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_ir_update.tips: Use dry_run first; changes apply after publish and can affect unified profiles.

d360_ir_full_update.tips: Full replacement is higher blast radius than PATCH. Compare against d360_ir_get output and dry_run before execution.

d360_ir_publish.tips: Publish activates the ruleset configuration. Review matching/reconciliation rules and dry_run first.

d360_ir_run.tips: Manual runs can consume compute and update unified profiles. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_dataspace_create.tips: Data spaces are admin/global workspaces. Confirm naming, membership plan, and downstream references; dry_run before execution.

d360_dataspace_update.tips: Use dry_run first; data space metadata is shared by downstream Data 360 assets.

d360_dataspace_member_add.tips: Verify member names and filter configuration before changing data-space access. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_sdm_validate.tips: Use validation before semantic query or downstream BI/RAG usage.

d360_sdm_query.tips: Keep query limits small and verify semantic model ids and field expressions first.

d360_sdm_create.tips: Create the shell first, then add data objects, relationships, calculated fields, and metrics. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_sdm_update.tips: Use dry_run first; model metadata changes can affect semantic queries, dashboards, and RAG retrievers.

d360_sdm_clone.tips: Dry-run first and verify the target apiName does not collide with an existing semantic model.

d360_sdm_data_object_create.tips: Verify the DMO, DLO, or CIO exists first. Use dataObjectType Dmo, Dlo, or Cio. Dry-run before execution.

d360_sdm_data_object_update.tips: Use dry_run first; changing a semantic data object can affect dimensions, measurements, relationships, and queries.

d360_sdm_calc_dim_create.tips: Use [DataObject].[Field] formula syntax and dry-run before execution.

d360_sdm_calc_dim_update.tips: Dry-run first and validate formula syntax with supported formula metadata.

d360_sdm_calc_measure_create.tips: Use aggregationType UserAgg for aggregate formulas and dry-run before execution.

d360_sdm_calc_measure_update.tips: Dry-run first and verify downstream metrics or semantic queries that reference the measure.

d360_sdm_metric_create.tips: Verify the metric definition JSON and dry-run before execution.

d360_sdm_metric_update.tips: Dry-run first; metric changes can affect BI and semantic query consumers.

d360_sdm_relationship_create.tips: Use semantic field API names from data object list output, not raw DMO field names. Dry-run before execution.

d360_sdm_relationship_update.tips: Dry-run first; relationship changes affect joins and semantic query results.

d360_datakit_list.tips: Use this to discover dataKitId values before component, manifest, or deployment-status operations.

d360_datakit_deploy.tips: Review the manifest, component dependencies, and target dataspace before deployment. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_metadata.tips: Use entityName or entityType to avoid broad metadata payloads. For compact DMO/DLO discovery, prefer the d360_metadata Pi tool.

d360_model_artifact_list.tips: Search index creation requires an embedding-capable model artifact; chat-completion-only orgs should report readiness as feature gated.

d360_datagraph_lookup.tips: Keep lookups bounded with lookupKeys or limit. Set live=true only when real-time graph lookup is required.

d360_standard_mapping_create.tips: Review standard mapping preview output or verified DLO/DMO field details first. The REST facade sends the reviewed mapping payload; upstream MCP local bulk lookup is not embedded here. Use dry_run before execution.

d360_query_sql_cancel.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_dmo_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_dlo_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_dmo_mapping_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_dmo_field_mapping_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_datastream_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_connection_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_segment_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_ci_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_ir_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_activation_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_activation_target_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_dataspace_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_dataspace_member_remove.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_transform_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_datakit_undeploy.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_dataaction_delete.tips: Delete the data action before deleting its data action target. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_dataaction_target_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_sdm_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_sdm_data_object_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_sdm_calc_dim_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_sdm_calc_measure_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_sdm_metric_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_sdm_relationship_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_search_index_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_retriever_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_retriever_config_delete.tips: Destructive operation. Actual execution is allowed only with target_org='AgentforceSTDM', allow_confirmed=true, and interactive Pi confirmation after reviewing dry_run output.

d360_standard_mapping_preview.tips: Local helper. Preview standard mappings first, then dry-run d360_standard_mapping_create with a reviewed payload.

d360_preview_field_matches.tips: Local helper. Use before smart mapping suggest to inspect confidence and unmatched fields.

d360_smart_mapping_suggest.tips: Local helper. Review mappingPayload, then dry-run d360_dmo_mapping_create.

d360_event_date_recommend.tips: Local helper. Prefer immutable event/created date fields over modified/updated fields.

d360_smart_datastream_create.tips: Local helper. Review enhancedBody, then dry-run d360_datastream_create.
